title: The Lifecycle of E-Waste and Management Strategies
description: This flowchart illustrates the journey of electronic waste from production to final disposal, highlighting key management strategies and the role of academic publishers like Oxford University Press in raising awareness.
relationships: Elements flow sequentially from Production to final disposal paths, with 'Awareness & Policy' influencing the decision points at Collection and Formal Recycling to steer waste away from Informal Recycling and Landfill.
